title: At the Restaurant
description: Practice ordering food and dining conversations

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Good evening. Welcome to our restaurant. Table for how many?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Right this way. Here are your menus.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. What do you recommend?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Our grilled salmon is very popular today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I'll have the salmon, please. And a glass of water.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Excellent choice. I'll be right back with your drink.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Excuse me, could we have the bill, please?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Yes, we accept all major cards.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Great. The food was delicious, thank you.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Thank you! We hope to see you again.
